name: GlassTech Solutions
description: Premium glass supplier specializing in fire-rated and architectural glass systems. Over 20 years of experience serving commercial and residential projects across the region. Known for exceptional quality control and technical support.

name: BuildSmart Materials Co.
description: Large-scale distributor of standard construction materials. Competitive pricing with good availability. Suitable for economy to standard grade projects. Fast delivery across multiple regions.

name: Structural Innovations Inc.
description: Specialized provider of high-strength structural materials. Focus on reinforced concrete and steel frame systems for demanding applications. Preferred supplier for coastal and high-rise construction.

name: EcoPanel Systems
description: Environmentally focused material supplier offering sustainable building solutions. Specializes in lightweight materials with excellent thermal properties. Competitive pricing for green building projects.

name: Premium Glass & Glazing
description: Exclusive supplier of high-end architectural glass products. Specializes in smart glass technology and premium safety glass systems. White-glove service for luxury projects.

name: QuickBuild Supply Chain
description: Fast-delivery material supplier focusing on standard construction needs. Large inventory with competitive bulk pricing. Best for time-sensitive projects with standard requirements.

name: Industrial Materials Hub
description: Heavy-duty materials supplier for industrial and commercial construction. Specializes in fire-rated and structural systems. Reliable partner for demanding projects.

name: Coastal Construction Materials
description: Regional supplier specializing in materials suitable for coastal and high-moisture environments. Expert knowledge in corrosion resistance and weather-resistant systems.
